fault_hypothesis: The overlap check on line 65 uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`), incorrectly treating adjacent time slots as non-overlapping. It should use strict inequalities (`<`, `>`) to correctly identify touching slots as conflicts.

spec.expr: not (a[1] == b[0] or b[1] == a[0]) or __cbfl_result

constraints.intent: The overlaps function must return true if two slots are adjacent.
A candidate that doesn't cause an early exit must not be adjacent to the slot just checked.

spec.expr: all(candidate[1] < s[0] or candidate[0] > s[1] for s in existing)

constraints.intent: If the candidate is merged, it implies it was not adjacent to any existing slot.

spec.expr: not __cbfl_result[0] or all(candidate[1] < s[0] or candidate[0] > s[1] for s in existing)

constraints.intent: An accepted candidate must not be adjacent to any slot in the original schedule.
